language_stack.framework: OpenTelemetry (tracing + logs) + slog (structured JSON) + Prometheus (metrics) + QuestDB (metrics TSDB) + Dragonfly (metrics backend) + custom sentinel (alerting) + PyO3 (Python bridge)

hygiene_evidence.README: README.md (7422B, with work-state header, badges, status block)
hygiene_evidence.CI: .github/workflows/ (19 workflows: ci, test, coverage, codeql, scorecard, sonarcloud, sbom-refresh, publish, release-dry-run, quality-gate, journey-gate, doc-links, trufflehog, cargo-audit, cargo-deny, cargo-machete, cargo-semver-checks, fr-coverage, codeql-rust)

dup_exposure: phenotype-bus / phenotype-event-bus (event bus; already pulled from HexaKit)
phenotype-errors / phenotype-error-core (error types; already pulled from HexaKit)
phenotype-request-id (request ID propagation for trace correlation)
phenotype-dep-guard (cargo-deny/audit policy enforcement; could share deny.toml/audit config with org baseline)
phenotype-registry (service registry for service-name resolution in spans/metrics)
phenotype-postfx (post-effect / middleware runner that could host #[instrument] wrappers)
phenotype-journeys (journey tracing primitives could be emitted via phenotype-observably-tracing)
phenotype-tooling / phenotype-shared (shared just/lint/CI recipes — repo already adopted phenotype.just library extended variant per ad3f212)
HexaKit (general hex toolkit; already a git dep for errors + bus)
Observably (peer observability provider — risk of overlapping API surface with phenotype-observably-*)
sota_gaps: Tail-based / adaptive sampling — only AlwaysSample and a planned ParentBased(TraceIDRatioBased(0.1)) are documented; no runtime cost-aware sampler
Exemplars (linking metrics ↔ traces) — Prometheus exporter path lacks exemplar support
OTel Logs protocol (not just traces) — only custom JSON stdout; no OTLP/logs exporter
eBPF / continuous-profiling signal — no profiler integration (Pyroscope, eBPF, OTLP profiling)
Real-User Monitoring (RUM) / browser SDK — ts/ exists but no end-user web vitals + session replay
Mobile SDKs (iOS/Android) — no native bindings; zig/wasi dirs are stubs
PII / data scrubbing / redaction engine — no automatic span/log field allow-list or hash-redaction
Cardinality control / metrics limits — no metric name/value cardinality guard
SLO primitives — no error-budget or burn-rate alert types in sentinel
GenAI cost & token tracking — phenotype-llm exists but no token/cost attributes on spans or cost dashboards
Auto-instrumentation — no #[auto-instrument] for common frameworks (axum, actix, tonic, sqlx) or Python (FastAPI, Django)
MCP server tooling split — phenotype-mcp-server is a domain squatter; per NFR-OBS-010 it is removed from workspace but directory persists (refactor/remove-domain-squatters PR open)
convergence_rationale: Rust-core observability hub with polyglot binding surfaces (python via PyO3, plus stub dirs in go/ts/mojo/zig/wasi/ffi). The architectural intent is to be the cross-stack telemetry provider for the entire Phenotype ecosystem, but production weight is concentrated in Rust + Python — a multi-stack project with a convergence trajectory, not a true web-stack or live-project.

action_items.title: Delete / archive the phenotype-llm and phenotype-mcp-server crates
action_items.why: Per NFR-OBS-010 these are domain squatters removed from the workspace; directories still exist and confuse new contributors. Resolves the open refactor/remove-domain-squatters PR.

action_items.title: Wire exemplar + OTLP-logs exporter into the metrics & logging crates
action_items.why: Closes the two biggest SOTA gaps (exemplars, OTel logs protocol) and unlocks metric→trace correlation for downstream Prometheus/Grafana users.

action_items.title: Extract a shared `phenotype-observably-ports` (already present) and migrate consumer repos to depend on it instead of duplicating trait crates
action_items.why: ports crate exists at crates/phenotype-observably-ports but no consumer repo (PhenoAgent, PhenoMCP, PhenoProc) declares it — mainlining it removes duplicated trait definitions across 5+ other Pheno repos.

action_items.title: Add PII redaction + cardinality limit middleware to tracely-core
action_items.why: Two adjacent SOTA gaps (scrubbing, cardinality control) share a span/log/metric post-processor layer; building them together is cheaper than two passes.

action_items.title: Implement tail-based sampler with cost feedback in phenotype-observably-tracing
action_items.why: Replaces the planned static ParentBased(TraceIDRatioBased(0.1))) and is the highest-leverage production-readiness gap; also unblocks SLO error-budget alerts downstream.
